div.p: Type: Similarity (Higher = More Similar) Range: (-∞, +∞) or [-1, 1] (Unit Vectors)

ul.li: Dot Product: Projection of A onto B scaled by length.
L2 Distance: The straight-line distance between vector tips.
Cosine: Only considers the angle θ between vectors (magnitude invariant).
Memory Alignment: Vector segments MUST be 64-byte aligned (Cache Line).
Padding: Gray-coded padding for non-multiple-of-16 dimensions.
